channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Several people hospitalised following multiple stabbing incidents in Queensland
item.description: Queensland police responded to a series of stabbing incidents across the state on Saturday night, resulting in multiple hospitalisations. In Cannon Hill, Brisbane, a man suffered life-threatening ches...

item.title: Study suggests melatonin may enhance DNA repair in night shift workers
item.description: A recent small clinical trial suggests that melatonin supplementation may help improve the body’s ability to repair oxidative DNA damage in night shift workers. The study, published in Occupational & ...

item.title: Luis Enrique Celebrates PSG's Consecutive Champions League Victory
item.description: Paris Saint-Germain (PSG) has successfully defended their UEFA Champions League title, marking a historic achievement for the club. Luis Enrique, the team's head coach, expressed immense pride, statin...

item.title: NNPP to skip 2027 presidential race, seeks alliances with other parties
item.description: The New Nigeria People’s Party (NNPP) has announced that it will not present a presidential candidate for the 2027 general election. Instead, the party says it is open to forming alliances with other ...

item.title: Allahabad High Court rules juvenile conviction cannot be used to deny passport application
item.description: The Allahabad High Court has ruled that a criminal conviction recorded when a person was a minor cannot be treated as a legal barrier to the issuance of a passport. The court emphasised the rehabilita...

item.title: Former safeguarding minister highlights rise in sexual offences committed by children
item.description: Former safeguarding minister Jess Phillips has issued a warning over the increasing prevalence of sexual offences committed by children, noting that the average age of child-on-child rapists is now ju...

item.title: Stormers overpower Cardiff to reach URC semi-finals
item.description: The Stormers produced a dominant all-round performance at Cape Town Stadium to defeat Cardiff 44-21 and book their place in the United Rugby Championship semi-finals. After leading 21-7 at half-time, ...

item.title: Trump's Social Media Activity Sparks Concerns About Mental Fitness
item.description: On May 30, 2026, former U.S. President Donald Trump posted a series of unusual and provocative content on his social media platform, Truth Social, prompting concern among journalists, political analys...

item.title: Free State Crinums defeat defending champions Fireballs to maintain unbeaten TNL run
item.description: The Free State Crinums continued their impressive run in the Telkom Netball League (TNL) by securing a strong 47-37 victory over defending champions the Gauteng Golden Fireballs at Ellis Park Arena in...

item.title: Nigeria's Super Eagles Win Unity Cup After 3-0 Victory Against Jamaica
item.description: Nigeria don show say dem no dey play as dem retain the Unity Cup with a solid 3-0 win over Jamaica for London. From the start, Alhassan Yusuf knack the first goal within two minutes after dem throw ba...

item.title: Trump faces criticism after Truth Social outburst over Kennedy Center dispute
item.description: Former President Donald Trump sparked widespread criticism after posting a lengthy and heated message on Truth Social regarding the Kennedy Center and a related court ruling. In his post, Trump sugges...

item.title: The 1914 Peugeot Bébé and the Birth of the Early Affordable City Car
item.description: The 1914 Peugeot Bébé was an important milestone in early automotive history, representing one of the first attempts to make motoring accessible to a broader public during the Edwardian era. Designed ...

item.title: Makinde meets families of abducted Oyo pupils and teachers, pledges sustained rescue efforts
item.description: Governor Seyi Makinde of Oyo State has met with families of pupils and teachers abducted in communities around Oriire Local Government Area, assuring them that his administration is fully committed to...

item.title: Pope Leo XIV on AI, Human Dignity, and Ethical Technology
item.description: In his recent encyclical 'Magnifica Humanitas,' Pope Leo XIV addresses the ethical challenges posed by artificial intelligence, emphasizing the need to protect human dignity in a rapidly changing tech...

item.title: Key national, international and sports updates: Karnataka leadership change, PSG Champions League victory, and major developments across India and abroad
item.description: The Morning Digest brings together key developments from India and around the world. In political news, D.K. Shivakumar has been elected as the leader of the Congress Legislature Party in Karnataka an...

item.title: RCMP investigates shooting of a foal along McLean Creek Trail in Kananaskis
item.description: The RCMP is investigating the shooting of a foal along McLean Creek Trail, southwest of Bragg Creek, in Kananaskis Country. The foal, believed to be only a few days old, was found injured on May 23 an...

item.title: New claims re-examine Marilyn Monroe’s death and her doctor’s involvement in prescribed medication
item.description: A new biography has reignited debate over the circumstances surrounding Marilyn Monroe’s death in 1962, suggesting that one of her doctors may have played a more significant role than previously ackno...

item.title: Focusing on Assumptions and Scenarios is Key to Navigating an Uncertain Future
item.description: Human decision-making often relies on mental shortcuts that work well for everyday situations but fall short when facing complex and rapidly changing environments. In such contexts, predicting the fut...

item.title: UK government considers under-16 social media ban following strong parental support in consultation
item.description: The UK government is actively considering introducing restrictions on social media use for children under 16 following a major public consultation that received more than 80,000 responses. Technology ...

item.title: US-Iran Tensions Continue as Peace Talks Stall and Military Stays on Alert
item.description: Tensions between the United States and Iran remain high as President Donald Trump weighs a tentative agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and restart nuclear negotiations. While US officials descr...
